allow: Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from accounts.models import Account; accounts = Account.objects.all\(\); [print\(f'{a.email}: {a.api_keys.all\(\)}'\) for a in accounts]")
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from accounts.models import Account; accounts = Account.objects.all\(\); print\(list\(accounts.values\('email', 'id'\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 manage.py shell -c "from accounts.models import Account; accounts = Account.objects.all\(\); print\(list\(accounts.values\('email', 'id'\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; User = get_user_model\(\); print\(list\(User.objects.values\('email', 'username', 'id'\)[:5]\)\)")
